core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Trading Terminal density with Sci-Fi HUD aesthetics.
Emotion First: The user feels like a commander of capital.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Zero chartjunk.

typography.heading_font_usage: Page Titles, Major Metric Labels (Equity, PnL)
rules: Overlines/Labels must be uppercase + tracking-widest + text-xs.
Tabular data must use JetBrains Mono + tabular-nums.

layout.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode B: High Density)
rules: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children.
Dashboard widgets must align to grid columns (12-col system).
No jagged bottoms in dashboard rows.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow.

charts.style: Minimal axes, grid lines opacity 0.1, tooltip with glassmorphism.

inputs.style: bg-secondary/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm

textures.usage: Subtle noise overlay on background (optional) to reduce banding.
textures.css: opacity-5 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay

rules: Hover: Immediate feedback (color change, border highlight).
Text contrast must meet APCA standards.
Charts must use patterns or distinct markers, not just color.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Sidebar' using Shadcn Sheet (mobile) and a custom collapsible div (desktop).
For the 'Dashboard', use a CSS Grid layout (Bento Grid).
Use 'Recharts' for all financial curves (Equity, Drawdown).
The 'Market Data Manager' should use a dense data table with status indicators.
Implement 'AI Research Assistant' as a floating widget or a drawer on the right.
Ensure the theme is locked to DARK mode (force class='dark' on html/body).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, only for subtle highlights or active states.
Follow the file structure: /app/frontend/src/pages/ for page components.
Install necessary fonts: Manrope, JetBrains Mono, Barlow Condensed via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS import.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for floating elements.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
